text: Reaction: After you collect fate during the dynasty phase, choose an opponent and bow this stronghold - gain 1 fate for each faceup non-stronghold province controlled by that player.
name: Shiro Shinjo

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed - if the current conflict is [conflict-political], switch the conflict type. Each conflict declared this phase is [conflict-military] instead of its normal type.
name: Khan's Ordu

text: Increase your deckbuilding influence value by 8. You may only spend influence on [clan-unicorn] clan cards.
name: Support of the Unicorn

text: No attachments. Action: During a conflict in which this character is not participating, choose up to 1 other character you control - move this character and that character to the conflict.
name: Wild Stallion

text: This character must be declared as an attacker or defender in the first conflict declared each round.
flavorText: Utaku women prove early on whether they have the strength and dedication to join the venerated ranks of the shiotome.
name: Young Warrior

text: Reaction: After an opponent's province is revealed during a conflict - this character gets +2[conflict-military] and +2[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.
flavorText: "Do you fear what lies beyond your sight?"
name: Shinjo Trailblazer

text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose an opponent's facedown province - reveal that province.
name: Iuchi Farseer

text: Sincerity. Action: Discard a card from your hand and choose an unbroken province not currently being attacked - turn that province facedown.
flavorText: "When I turned sixteen I vowed to escape or to die in the attempt, thereby to free my father to act against the caliph's tyranny."
name: Saadiyah al-Mozedu

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a character - that character gets +1[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict for each faceup non-stronghold province your opponent controls.
flavorText: Even the greatest amount of love for his firstborn daughter could not hinder his duty to the Emperor.
name: Iuchi Daiyu

text: This character does not bow during the conflict resolution of conflicts in which a province your opponent controls was broken.
flavorText: "Where is it written that the Khan of Khans must always be a Shinjo?"
name: Moto Chagatai

text: No attachments. Reaction: After you play this character, choose an opponent - that player may reveal any number of his or her facedown non-stronghold provinces. Then, place 1 fate on this character for each facedown province that player controls (including their stronghold province).
name: Aranat

text: Reaction: After a character is moved to or played into a conflict in which this character is participating - until the end of the conflict, this character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political]. (Unlimited.)
flavorText: "We cannot simply hide on our wall and wait."
name: Hida Tsuru

text: Reaction: After a phase begins, if you have the Imperial Favor, choose a character - honor that character.
flavorText: From the virtue of her writing, gossip about the former Imperial Advisor inevitably becomes reverent praise.
name: Kakita Ryoku

text: Reaction: After you play this character, choose a non-stronghold province - that province cannot be attacked this round.
flavorText: "How could it be wrong to seek the enlightenment the ise zumi so effortlessly possess, when we all work towards Togashi's wisdom?"
name: Agasha Taiko

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, sacrifice this character - bow each participating character. Characters cannot be moved to this conflict.
flavorText: "The art of archery is the art of letting go."
name: Kaito Nobukai

text: Reaction: After an opponent discards 1 or more cards from his or her hand due to the cost or effect of a card ability, choose a character - dishonor that character.
name: Shosuro Hyobu

text: No attachments. Reaction: After the resolution of a conflict in which this character was attacking, if a province was broken in the conflict - immediately declare your next conflict for the phase. That conflict is [conflict-military] instead of its normal type.
flavorText: "Fat, stupid, and ugly. A perfect unicorn!" - Caliph Harun
name: Ivory Kingdoms Unicorn

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose up to 1 other character you control - move this character and that character home.
flavorText: She comes with foreign wisdom and leaves with fresh alliances.
name: Visiting Advisor

text: No attachments except Weapon. During a conflict, reduce the cost to play this character by 1 for each participating [clan-unicorn] character you control.
flavorText: "There are strange creatures that lie within Shinomen that are... unlikely to greet us as friends. Stay on your guard." - Shinjo Tatsuo
name: Shinomen Wayfinders

text:
Attach to a [clan-unicorn] character. Restricted.
While attached character is attacking, it gets an additional +2[conflict-military].
name: Curved Blade

text: During the fate phase, if you are the first player, attached character cannot lose fate or be discarded.
flavorText: "For the next thousand days and a day, may you contemplate the suffering you have wrought upon the lives of innocents."
name: Ring of Binding

text: Attach to a [clan-unicorn] character. Attached character gains the Cavalry trait. Reaction: After attached character wins a [conflict-military] conflict - honor attached character.
name: Utaku Battle Steed

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a [clan-unicorn] character - that character gets +1[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict for each faceup non-stronghold province your opponent controls. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: "Let this be a token of good will, that a prosperous future awaits us both."
name: Speak to the Heart

text: Reaction: After you win a [conflict-military] as the attacker - draw 3 cards. Then, choose and discard 1 card from your hand. (Max 1 per conflict.)
flavorText: "It would be a shame to leave such craftsmanship to rust."
name: Spoils of War

text: Action: During a conflict - move each participating Cavalry character you control home. Then, choose any number of Cavalry character you control and move them to the conflict.
name: Warriors of the Wind

text: During each conflict in which this character is participating, it gets +3[conflict-military] and +3[conflict-political] if your opponent has broken one or more of your provinces this phase.
flavorText: "You dishonor yourself and your clan with this rejection, Mistress of the Impetuous Winds."
name: Ikoma Anakazu

text: Reaction: After an opponent's province is revealed during a conflict in which attached character is participating - look at the top 3 cards of one of your decks. You may put any number of those cards on the bottom of that deck and the rest on top in any order.
name: Compass

text: Interrupt: When the draw phase would begin - skip the draw phase. Each player removes the top 4 cards of his or her conflict deck from the game. Until the end of the round, either player may play the removed cards as if they were in his or her hand.
name: Trading on the Sand Road
